name: synap-ratings
description: Landing page with lead capture - Frontend + Backend

scripts.dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development PORT=5001 concurrently "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.clean: rimraf backend/dist frontend/dist backend/node_modules frontend/node_modules node_modules
